mnemonics: TEST - Think Encryption, Secure Sharing, and Training (to remember the key components of data security testing: Encryption checks, Secure data sharing protocols, and Employee training awareness).
keyPoints: A thorough test component must validate both technical controls (like encryption and access logs) and human factors (like phishing susceptibility).
Testing should be an ongoing process, not a one-time event, to adapt to new threats and system changes.
The test scope must include all three states of data: at rest, in transit, and in processing.
commonMistakes: Only testing for external threats and neglecting the risk of internal actors or accidental data exposure.
Focusing solely on penetration testing while ignoring the critical role of policy review and employee training simulations.
Failing to test data recovery procedures, assuming backups are always viable without verification.
